title: Museum audio guide
explanation:
Museum audio guide

Listen to part of a museum audio guide.

Transcript

Guide: You are now standing in front of the museum's most visited painting. Created in 1889, it captures the artist's view from his room during a difficult period of his life. Notice the thick brushstrokes and intense colours, which were highly unusual at the time. Many visitors are surprised to learn that the work was barely recognised during the artist's lifetime and only became famous after his death.

questions.text: It shows the artist's view from his [*room|garden|boat].
The style includes thick brushstrokes and intense [*colours|sounds|smells].
The work became famous mainly [*after the artist's death|during his childhood|last year only].

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: This is the museum's most ____ painting. | *visited | hidden | broken
The artist painted during a difficult ____ of his life. | *period | ticket | recipe
The technique was highly ____ at the time. | *unusual | boring | cheap
Many visitors are ____ by the story. | *surprised | charged | delayed
The guide's purpose is to [*inform visitors about the artwork|sell tickets|discuss sports].
The painting was [*not widely recognised|immediately famous|recently discovered] in the artist's lifetime.
Visual features mentioned include brushstrokes and [*colours|music|food].
